text: Nko ibǝ ɔyimisani nuǝfǝ ku utsyǝfǝ isu ese okuansele mǝmblɛ dífi usio ǝmǝ bafia nya mǝ nti kuutsyuǝ ku usio ǝmǝ mánle fɛ békpǝ.
translated: I am not a liar, and I do not speak with two mouths. I speak the truth, and if I had lied, the earth would have swallowed me long ago, or the river would have swept me away.

text: Nya nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi kasini minkǝ ebɔkɛ lǝ mfó isu ese lefe nǝ foofo kayo ka fensi alosǝ. Yanle Bǝ Bǝsǝ Ku Bǝsiǝ Fe Bǝtsyuǝ Kama.

text: Usio ǝmǝ mfó ǝnyǝ utsyǝ lekpo nkǝ lesatsyuǝ ǝbǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso lǝ sikpitete ku ketinkǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́bɔ úbǝ óse akonki lǝ Yesu eto akɔ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ, lesa nǝ díbǝ.
translated: There was a man who had two sons. The younger one said to his father, "Father, give me my share of the estate." So he divided his property between them. text: Nya Onanto eto betidi luuyǝnde fe kofe lǝ mǝ Onanto eto umǝ. Mba ato nkpee, tsyue ato lǝ banɔ! Yesu Átɛyi Lekpá Itsyi Lǝ Bike Bia Lefo Konya Bia Béfi Bákula Ǝsuǝ.

translated: The parents of Jesus took him to the temple in Jerusalem to present him to God. They also offered two doves as a sacrifice. When they had done everything according to the law, they returned home to Nazareth in Galilee. The child grew and became strong and wise, and God blessed him.
